'''ponanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:upcity|upcity]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:upcity|upcity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ponanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ponanithi|ponanithi]] || [[word:ponaniji|ponaniji]] || [[word:ponanishi|ponanishi]] || [[word:ponaniki|ponaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ponanuthuthu|ponanuthuthu]] || [[word:ponanujuju|ponanujuju]] || [[word:ponanushushu|ponanushushu]] || [[word:ponanukuku|ponanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ponanuthu|ponanuthu]] || [[word:ponanuju|ponanuju]] || [[word:ponanushu|ponanushu]] || [[word:ponanuku|ponanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ponanufthuf|ponanufthuf]] || [[word:ponanufjuf|ponanufjuf]] || [[word:ponanufshuf|ponanufshuf]] || [[word:ponanufkuf|ponanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ponanethe|ponanethe]] || [[word:ponaneje|ponaneje]] || [[word:ponaneshe|ponaneshe]] || [[word:ponaneke|ponaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ponanothotho|ponanothotho]] || [[word:ponanojojo|ponanojojo]] || [[word:ponanoshosho|ponanoshosho]] || [[word:ponanokoko|ponanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ponanotho|ponanotho]] || [[word:ponanojo|ponanojo]] || [[word:ponanosho|ponanosho]] || [[word:ponanoko|ponanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ponanofthof|ponanofthof]] || [[word:ponanofjof|ponanofjof]] || [[word:ponanofshof|ponanofshof]] || [[word:ponanofkof|ponanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfthÃŸf|ponanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfjÃŸf|ponanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfshÃŸf|ponanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfkÃŸf|ponanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|ponanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|ponanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|ponanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|ponanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfthÃŸf|ponanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfjÃŸf|ponanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfshÃŸf|ponanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfkÃŸf|ponanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfthÃŸf|ponanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfjÃŸf|ponanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfshÃŸf|ponanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:ponanÃŸfkÃŸf|ponanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ponanÃḊthÃḊ|ponanÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:ponanÃḊjÃḊ|ponanÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:ponanÃḊshÃḊ|ponanÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:ponanÃḊkÃḊ|ponanÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ponanathatha|ponanathatha]] || [[word:ponanajaja|ponanajaja]] || [[word:ponanashasha|ponanashasha]] || [[word:ponanakaka|ponanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ponanatha|ponanatha]] || [[word:ponanaja|ponanaja]] || [[word:ponanasha|ponanasha]] || [[word:ponanaka|ponanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ponanafthaf|ponanafthaf]] || [[word:ponanafjaf|ponanafjaf]] || [[word:ponanafshaf|ponanafshaf]] || [[word:ponanafkaf|ponanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ponanasha|ponanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ponanshÃḋsha|ponanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ponanrosha|ponanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ponanmusha|ponanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ponanyasha|ponanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goponankshÃḋsha|goponankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goponankrosha|goponankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goponankmusha|goponankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goponankyasha|goponankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ponananasha|ponananasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ponananshÃḋsha|ponananshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ponananrosha|ponananrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ponananmusha|ponananmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ponananyasha|ponananyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goponanankshÃḋsha|goponanankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goponanankrosha|goponanankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goponanankmusha|goponanankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goponanankyasha|goponanankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:penÃḊnasha|penÃḊnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:penÃḊnshÃḋsha|penÃḊnshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:penÃḊnrosha|penÃḊnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:penÃḊnmusha|penÃḊnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:penÃḊnyasha|penÃḊnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopenÃḊnkshÃḋsha|gopenÃḊnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopenÃḊnkrosha|gopenÃḊnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopenÃḊnkmusha|gopenÃḊnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopenÃḊnkyasha|gopenÃḊnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ponfanasha|ponfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ponfanshÃḋsha|ponfanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ponfanrosha|ponfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ponfanmusha|ponfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ponfanyasha|ponfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goponfankshÃḋsha|goponfankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goponfankrosha|goponfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goponfankmusha|goponfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goponfankyasha|goponfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
